Meaning: The earlier 10-image test set. Some exploratory tests evaluated original+enhanced variants, giving 20 evaluated samples.
The current 38-image test set: 25 coral images and 13 shell images.
Training set contains both the original converted JPEG and an enhanced JPEG version of each training photo.
Saved preprocessing variants used for experiment comparison; updated results suggest they do not currently improve generalization.
Internal validation scores were often perfect, so the external wild test is more meaningful for choosing a model.
